P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Play the over 7.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 80% model conviction at 11.4K vs 7.5 line.
Misiorowski generates genuine swing-and-miss (38.0% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CHC is a mild headwind — 22.2% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Moderate variance (σ2.3K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Edge lives at the 7.5 alt line vs the 9.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.6 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓CU converts two-strike counts (45% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (2.2 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗Variance on any given start (σ2.3K) — projection is a median, not a floor

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.6K vs 4.5. 63% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Alvarez is above average on whiff rate (28.2%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. BAL is a good matchup — 26.2% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Very consistent output (σ0.7K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓SI converts two-strike counts (33% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓BAL swings vs his specific mix (26.2% MIX-K) — lineup is genuinely exploitable
✓Consistent output (σ0.7K) — model projection is reliable, not driven by one outlier
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.2 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗First-pitch strike rate (49%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

Signal
Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.4K vs 4.5. 61% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Arrighetti sits around league average on whiff rate (25.9%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. DET is roughly neutral — 22.88% MIX-K close to league average. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 6.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓FC converts two-strike counts (31% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Control is a problem (4.2 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts
✗First-pitch strike rate (54%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.3K vs 4.5. 59% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Eovaldi is above average on whiff rate (29.7%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. TOR is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 18.0%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Moderate variance (σ1.9K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.7 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SI converts two-strike counts (35% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (2.1 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗TOR makes contact vs his pitch mix (18.0% MIX-K) — tough K environment today

Marginal over edge (8.5K vs 7.5), 59% conviction — take it reduced.
Skenes is above average on whiff rate (28.8%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CIN is a good matchup — 26.06% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Edge lives at the 7.5 alt line vs the 8.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓SL converts two-strike counts (34% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (1.8 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
✓CIN swings vs his specific mix (26.1% MIX-K) — lineup is genuinely exploitable
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.9 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Lean over 5.0 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (5.6K vs 5.0), 49% conviction — take it reduced.
Ginn is above average on whiff rate (26.8%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. FF is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. LAA is a good matchup — 25.6% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Moderate variance (σ2.3K) — no major consistency flags.
Bet wins if
✓FF converts two-strike counts (32% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓LAA swings vs his specific mix (25.6% MIX-K) — lineup is genuinely exploitable
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Control is a problem (3.8 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts
✗First-pitch strike rate (55%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

Signal
Lean under 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (4.5K vs 5.5), 34% confidence — lean only.
Cantillo is above average on whiff rate (27.5%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SEA is roughly neutral — 24.22% MIX-K close to league average. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Edge lives at the 5.5 alt line, not the main 4.5 — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Short average outing (5.0 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 8.6 means the ceiling exists — a long outing can push over the number
✗Low FPS (54%) — he works from behind, counts go deep, Ks can build late
✗FC is an out pitch (32% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Signal
Lean under 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (4.4K vs 5.5), 30% confidence — lean only.
Abbott sits around league average on whiff rate (22.3%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. PIT is a good matchup — 25.52% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Edge lives at the 5.5 alt line, not the main 4.5 — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.8) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Short average outing (5.6 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗CU is an out pitch (26% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow
✗PIT is a swing-happy lineup (25.5% MIX-K) — could push him to the number

P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.3K vs 4.5), 27% confidence — lean only.
Rea is below average on swing-and-miss (20.5% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. MIL is a mild headwind — 22.12% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line, not the main 3.5 — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.7) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Short average outing (5.1 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗CU is an out pitch (24% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.0K vs 4.5), 23% confidence — lean only.
Corbin is below average on swing-and-miss (20.5% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. FF is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. TEX is a good matchup — 26.56% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Moderate variance (σ1.8K) — no major consistency flags.

Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.0K vs 4.5), 22% confidence — lean only.
Rogers sits around league average on whiff rate (22.4%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. WSH is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 20.2%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.7) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Elite first-pitch strike rate (67%) — batters put the ball in play early, not deep counts
✓Short average outing (4.9 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗FC is an out pitch (26% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data

Pass.Pass
Model projects 5.4K vs 5.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Tolle sits around league average on whiff rate (24.0%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. NYY is roughly neutral — 23.78% MIX-K close to league average. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
⚠ Edge lives at the 5.5 alt line vs the 6.5 market main — be on the right number.

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data

Pass.Pass
Model projects 4.4K vs 4.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Castillo sits around league average on whiff rate (25.2%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CLE is a mild headwind — 21.46% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Very consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.

Model v9.9
K Props · F5 · NRFI · methodology + weightings · v9.9 tiering
📈 Live Performance — through Jun 25 · 89 bets
63%
WIN RATE
56–33
+11.4%
ROI
$+1003
2.06
Z-SCORE
significant ✓
Overall 56–33 · ROI +11.4% · $+1003
63%
Overs 24–10
71%
Unders 32–23 · bias +0.93K
58%
STRONG 4–1
80%
MOD 10–5
67%
LEAN O 12–3
80%
LEAN U 29–22
57%
⚠ Bias note: Projections run +0.76K high overall. Under bias +0.93K — actuals beat proj by ~0.9K on avg when fading. Overs win at 71% vs unders 57%. Option A + blended LG baseline fixes applied Jun 26 — monitor next 20 bets.
❓ CAP — Model Confidence Score
CAP = overall strength of evidence (0–100%). NOT win probability — measures how aligned the signals are. Used in tiering thresholds: STRONG ≥ 62% · MOD ≥ 58%.
≥80% all signals align · 55–70% edge exists, mixed evidence — size down · <55% thin confidence.
① P(over) — Poisson probability of clearing the line
~40%
② Edge size — raw Ks above / below the line
~30%
③ σ stability — variance penalty on volatile pitchers
~20%
④ Blend quality — depth of L10 data vs prior weight
~10%
⚡ K Props — Strikeout Projection v9.9
6-step formula — runs in this order every session:
① Normalise L10: adj_k = raw_k × (21.51 / opp_K%)
② Scale K/9 to avg IP per start
③ σ-blend: σ≤1.2 → 75/25 · σ≤2.2 → 70/30 · σ>2.2 → 58/42 (L10/K9)
④ 5-factor base_proj (whiff · fps · putaway · arsenal · park)
⑤ OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (normalised) + 40% BBRef K%
⑥ rm_raw = opp_kpct_eff ÷ LG_blend · HARD ow=1.00 · EASY ow=0.65
Adj L10 base · opp-normalised · σ-driven blend
32%
Whiff% vs lg avg (25%) — strongest Statcast K predictor
22%
OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (arsenal-normalised) + 40% BBRef
18%
Putaway% vs lg avg (19%) — 2-strike whiff rate
11%
FPS% vs lg avg (63%) — command drives deep counts
9%
Park factor (2.0 − park) — small but real
6%
σ variance penalty — volatile pitchers capped lower
2%
MIX-K% Option A: batter K% per pitch type ÷ LG avg for that type → rescaled to 21.51%.
Removes suppression on SI=11.96% / CU=14.09% pitchers vs SW=29.44% / CB=29.73% pitchers.
Constants: 4S=21.98% · SI=11.96% · CH=23.14% · CU=14.09% · SL=27.12% · SW=29.44% · CB=29.73% · SF=25.88%
STRONG edge≥+1.5K · P(O)≥25% · CAP≥62% · 2u  ·  MOD edge≥+0.5K · P(O)≥15% · CAP≥58% · 1–1.5u
LEAN O edge≥+0.5K · CAP≥45% · 0.5u  ·  LEAN U edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥20% · 0.5u
UNDER edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥58% · 1u (1.5u if CAP≥65 + σ≤2)
🔴 F5 — First 5 Innings v9.9
blended_ERA = 0.65 × season_ERA + 0.35 × L3_ERA (live from kdata)
sp_r      = (blended_ERA / 4.50) × 2.5 × park × fps_adj
lineup_r = (wRC+ / 100) × (L10_RPG / 4.35) × 2.42
F5_runs  = sp_r × 0.50 + lineup_r × 0.50
SP: blended ERA (65% season + 35% L3) × park × FPS adj
50%
Lineup wRC+ vs pitcher handedness (lg avg 100)
25%
Opponent L10 R/G vs lg avg (4.35)
25%
🎯 NRFI / YRFI — First Inning v9.9
λ_base     = f(ERA, FPS%, WHIP, park)
woba_ratio = top4_lineup_avg_woba ÷ 0.318 (LG avg)
λ_adj      = λ_base × (0.70 + 0.30 × woba_ratio)
P(NRFI)    = e^(−λ_away) × e^(−λ_home)
Pitcher: ERA · FPS% · WHIP → Poisson λ base
70%
Top-4 lineup woba ÷ 0.318 LG avg (Savant, fresh daily)
30%
NRFI ≥62% · NRFI lean 57–61% · Skip 43–56% · YRFI ≤42%
Top-4 hitters with Savant woba. Danger ≥.400 · Watch ≥.360 · Manageable <.360
📐 Implied Odds Box
Poisson (λ = proj K) → probability + American odds per alt line threshold.
BET row = our recommended line (best edge vs projection). MKT row = market main (~+100 crossover).
⚠ bet · mkt N in card summary = our line differs from market — be on the right number.
P(K ≥ n) = 1 − Σ(k=0 to n−1) [e^−λ × λ^k / k!]
P≥50%: −round(P/(1−P)×100)  ·  P<50%: +round((1−P)/P×100)
📡 Data Sources
✓ Real (API) — L10 K counts · pitch counts · season ERA/K9/BB9/WHIP · FanDuel alt lines + odds
✓ Savant CSV — batter woba/K%/PA per pitch type (572 batters) · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
⚠ Researched — team wRC+ · L10 R/G · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef K% splits (updated Jun 8)
✗ Gaps — L10 opponents (API returns ? → falls back to raw avg) · live Statcast splits · real-time lineup changes
↑
